allow: Bash(PYTHONPATH=. python -c "from certops.policies.safety_verifier import verify_scaling; result = verify_scaling\(5, max_pods=10\); print\('Safety verification result:', result\)")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=. python -c "from certops.analysis.anomaly_detector import detect_pod_failures; pods = [{'name': 'pod-1', 'namespace': 'default', 'status': 'Running'}, {'name': 'pod-2', 'namespace': 'default', 'status': 'CrashLoopBackOff'}]; failures = detect_pod_failures\(pods\); print\('Detected failures:', failures\)")
